case_title: COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC. VS. KREIG ZIMMERMAN

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ZIMMERMAN, KREIG JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
